metadata.description: Yash Singh's opinionated coding standards plugin for Python and React/Next.js, the agentic engineering stack, and agent governance audits.

plugins.name: the-y-coding-standard
plugins.description: Hard-opinionated standards for Python, React/Next.js, and object-oriented design + AGENTS.md template + full Sprint Loop (/y-office-hours through /y-retro) + parallel governance audit via /y-govern.
